headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Cincinnati Financial, Raises Price Target to $175
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains Cincinnati Financial (NASDAQ:CINF) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $161 to $175.

headline: CINCINNATI FINANCIAL CORP (NASDAQ:CINF): A Strong Dividend Track Record Backed by Solid Fundamentals
summary: Screen for reliable dividend stocks using ChartMill’s Dividend, Profitability, and Health Ratings. Cincinnati Financial (CINF) offers a 2.23% yield, 10-year growth, low debt, and strong fundamentals.

headline: Best Dividend Kings: May 2026
